meta.title: CrossFit training taxonomy and personalization rules
meta.purpose: Keep CrossFit goals, equipment contexts, experience defaults, and limiter rules out of renderer code.

coaching.en: General fitness rule: preserve long-term consistency before chasing benchmark scores.
coaching.zh: 综合体能规则：先保护长期稳定训练，再追求基准成绩。

coaching.en: Affiliate class rule: the day should feel like warm-up, skill or strength, metcon, and cooldown rather than a random circuit.
coaching.zh: 盒子团课规则：当天应像热身、技术或力量、MetCon、冷却的完整课堂，而不是随机循环。

coaching.en: Open-prep rule: Preserve the intended stimulus before chasing Rx.
coaching.zh: Open 备赛规则：先保留目标刺激，再追 Rx。

coaching.en: Competition rule: use recent benchmarks and coach review before adding extra volume.
coaching.zh: 比赛规则：增加训练量前，先用近期基准成绩和教练复盘判断。

coaching.en: Home-equipment rule: substitute equipment while preserving movement pattern, time domain, and breathing demand.
coaching.zh: 少器械规则：替换器械时保留动作模式、时间域和呼吸需求。

coaching.en: Minimal-gym rule: choose dumbbells, kettlebells, strict bodyweight work, and machines before forcing complex barbell work.
coaching.zh: 基础健身房规则：优先用哑铃、壶铃、严格自重和器械，不强行做复杂杠铃动作。

coaching.en: Affiliate-gym rule: use coach feedback and class standards to validate movement range and scaling.
coaching.zh: 盒子规则：用教练反馈和课堂标准确认动作幅度与 Scale。

coaching.en: Full-setup rule: more equipment is useful only when it improves the planned stimulus.
coaching.zh: 完整器械规则：更多器械只有在服务当天目标刺激时才有意义。

coaching.en: Newcomer rule: mechanics and consistency override intensity every day.
coaching.zh: 新手规则：每天都以动作机制和稳定性优先于强度。

coaching.en: Recreational rule: progress only one variable at a time: load, skill difficulty, speed, or volume.
coaching.zh: 普通训练者规则：每次只推进一个变量：重量、技能难度、速度或训练量。

coaching.en: Veteran rule: decide whether the limiter is skill, strength, engine, or pacing before adding work.
coaching.zh: 老鸟规则：加训练前先判断短板是技能、力量、心肺还是配速。

coaching.en: Competitive rule: daily split quality and recovery trend override fixed volume.
coaching.zh: 竞技规则：每日分段质量和恢复趋势优先于固定训练量。

coaching.en: Limiter rule: record the movement that first breaks positions, pace, or breathing.
coaching.zh: 短板规则：记录最先破坏动作位置、节奏或呼吸的动作。

coaching.en: Engine limiter rule: keep cyclic pieces repeatable before adding all-out intervals.
coaching.zh: 心肺短板规则：先让循环动作可重复，再加入全力间歇。

coaching.en: Strength limiter rule: use heavy days and low-fatigue strength work before hiding weakness inside metcons.
coaching.zh: 力量短板规则：先用重训日和低疲劳力量训练解决问题，不要把短板藏在 MetCon 里。

coaching.en: Gymnastics limiter rule: scale range, angle, tempo, and volume before forcing high-skill reps under fatigue.
coaching.zh: 体操短板规则：先调整幅度、角度、节奏和训练量，不在疲劳下硬做高技能次数。

coaching.en: Weightlifting limiter rule: bar path, receiving position, and bracing quality decide load, not ego.
coaching.zh: 举重短板规则：重量由杠铃路径、接杠位置和核心支撑质量决定，不由面子决定。

coaching.en: Pacing limiter rule: make the first third boring enough that the final third still has mechanics.
coaching.zh: 节奏短板规则：前三分之一要稳到无聊，后三分之一仍能保持动作机制。
